name: frontend-e2e
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project frontend-e2e --web

options.command: npm run e2e:local:prepare && E2E_AUTH_SECRET=e2e-local-secret BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx playwright test -c apps/frontend-e2e/playwright.config.ts apps/frontend-e2e/src/core-regression.spec.ts --project=chromium
